title: Verified Revenue Link
description: Ads v1 link from Ads measurement to Commerce Verified Revenue, explicitly separating raw, clean, and verified revenue amounts.
$comment: Sources: PACK-07, TECH-07, and TECH-04. Official ROAS must use verified revenue only. Pending revenue, unpaid orders, comments, inbox, quote, cart, and order draft must not be treated as verified revenue.

attribution_id.description: Attribution record linked to this revenue.

link_status.description: Link status. TODO: define official verified revenue link status enum.

raw_clean_verified_boundary_checked.description: Whether raw/clean/verified revenue boundaries were checked.

not_revenue_if_unpaid.description: Invariant: unpaid or pending orders are not verified revenue.
